subcodes.first_line: O handmaidens of God! In these days, in the regions of Europe and America, strife and contention hath arisen between men and women [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیزان الهی در این ایام در اقالیم فرنگ و امریکا بین رجال و نساء نزاع و
subcodes.subjects: @equality of men and women, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @spiritual transformation, @differences in human capacity
